sessions_sample.raw: E: 2-3 miles;  walk 2 min  every .5 mile if necessary
sessions_sample.parsing_note: The session includes a walk break which may complicate distance parsing.

sessions_sample.raw: E: 2-3 miles;  walk 2 min  every 1 mile if necessary
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Similar to previous, includes walk breaks affecting distance interpretation.

sessions_sample.raw: 3-4 miles as 10 min WU;  I: 4-6 x 1 min  in Z4 w/2 min recovery;  10 min CD
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Includes warm-up and interval details that may confuse session role.

sessions_sample.raw: E: 2-3 miles;  walk as needed, but aim for mostly running
sessions_sample.parsing_note: The phrase 'walk as needed' adds ambiguity to the session's structure.

sessions_sample.raw: E: 3-4 miles;  walk 1 min  every 1.5 miles if necessary
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Includes a walk break which complicates the distance parsing.

unhandled_patterns.pattern: walk 2 min  every .5 mile if necessary
unhandled_patterns.issue: The parser may not correctly interpret the walking breaks as part of the session's structure.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Recognize and parse walking breaks as part of the session's distance and structure.

unhandled_patterns.pattern: as 10 min WU;  I: 4-6 x 1 min  in Z4 w/2 min recovery;  10 min CD
unhandled_patterns.issue: The session includes multiple components (warm-up, intervals, cool-down) that may not be parsed correctly.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Allow for multi-part sessions that include warm-ups, intervals, and cool-downs, and parse each component separately.

new_abbreviations.example: 3-4 miles as 10 min WU;  I: 4-6 x 1 min  in Z4 w/2 min recovery;  10 min CD
3-4 miles as 10 min WU;  I: 4-6 x 1 min  in Z4 w/2 min recovery;  10 min CD
I: 4-6 x 1 min  in Z4 w/2 min recovery

prompt_improvements: Recognize and parse walking breaks as part of the session's distance and structure.
Allow for multi-part sessions that include warm-ups, intervals, and cool-downs, and parse each component separately.
anomalies: The plan includes a mix of structured running sessions with walk breaks, which may not fit standard parsing expectations.
